Hero.Title: FastyGo app shell is ready
Hero.Description: This catalog block mirrors the current app layer: sidebar navigation, header navigation, a content area, static routes, assets, and render tests.

Cards.Title: Sidebar shell
Cards.Description: Desktop sidebar with primary navigation and active state.

Cards.Title: Header navigation
Cards.Description: Separate top navigation that moves into the mobile menu group.

Cards.Title: Static assets
Cards.Description: CSS, theme script, and UI behavior bundles are served by the app.

Cards.Title: Render tests
Cards.Description: Wireframe render tests cover the shell, sheet hooks, and visible copy.

Layers.Name: github.com/fastygo/framework
Layers.Description: HTTP host, routes, locales, static assets.

Layers.Name: github.com/fastygo/templ
Layers.Description: Templ primitives and composites used by the app shell.

Layers.Name: internal/ui/layout
Layers.Description: Runtime sidebar, header, mobile sheet, footer, and shell props.

Layers.Name: internal/fixtures
Layers.Description: English and Russian locale fixtures for visible copy.

Notice.Title: Catalog copy, not runtime code
Notice.Description: This block is a portable snapshot of the current FastyGo app layer. It duplicates shell ideas intentionally and does not import runtime layout or fixtures.
